description:
⚙️ WORKSHOP: Build an AI Operating System for Your Business in 7 Days: https://bit.ly/aios-biggest-shift
📈 Get daily AIOS Workshops from me in my Accelerator: https://bit.ly/4rRJX8m

📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 280k+ members: https://bit.ly/4rK2pQ1
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/4rKYRgB
📋 Get our FREE 14-day playbook for finding high-impact AI opportunities in any business: https://bit.ly/14-day-playbook-

My Vlog/BTS Channel: https://bit.ly/LiamOttleyVlogs

This video is your blueprint to build a no‑code AI operating system that runs your entire business—faster than a team and without hiring an agency. I break down the 5-layer AI OS (Context, Data, Intelligence, Automate, Build), the daily Telegram intelligence brief, and a unified data layer that let me run four companies from my phone—plus the exact 7‑day, $1M webinar case study. You’ll see how to integrate real business data (CRM, analytics, revenue), deploy high‑leverage automations (proposals, reporting, content, follow‑ups), and turn AI into a connected, thinking system—not just another chatbot. Built with Cloud Code and battle‑tested across agency, media, education, and SaaS (serving NBA teams and Fortune 500s), this is a practical playbook for AI automation, founder leverage, and scalable growth in the AI era.

⏱️ Timestamps:
0:00 - What We’re Covering
2:11 - What is AIOS
3:53 - Layer #1
4:36 - Layer #2
5:13 - Layer #3
6:09 - Layer #4
7:47 - Layer #5
11:17 - The 7‑day sprint playbook + free live training to build your AI OS

chapters.title: The 7‑day sprint playbook + free live training to build your AI OS
